ideation: This sequence simulates a single drop of blood falling.  Since our robot doesn't have hands capable of holding or dripping anything, we'll represent the falling drop using a stylized arm movement that evokes the feeling of something falling. The overall movement will be subtle, focusing on a downward motion of one arm and a slight recoil. Frame 1 will show both arms relaxed at the side. Frame 2 will have the left arm begin to move downward, as if it is the source of the drop. Frame 3 will show the left arm at the bottom of its arc, and Frame 4 will show both arms returning to their resting position.  This will create a visual effect suggesting a small, quick event.

frames.beat: both arms hang still, a moment of quiet
the left arm begins a slow descent, a single drop forming
the drop falls, the arm reaches its lowest point
the arm recoils slightly, the drop has landed
